creator: thomas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that submitter's email address is not working correctly:

<vermaden@interia.pl>: host mx.poczta.interia.pl[80.48.65.10] said:
 550 Wyslij ten list przez wlasciwy dla Twojej domeny serwer pocztowy / Please
     send this message through an authorized mail server (in reply to RCPT TO
     command)

(No, I won't be jumping through hoops to accomodate junk blacklists.)

Thomas.
